response.original_title: 📝 How Long Does Robinhood Hold Money? (2026 US Guide) ☀️+1 |888| 576| 2041
response.overview: ⏳ Robinhood Settlement Time (US Rules Explained) When you sell stocks on Robinhood, the money doesn’t become withdrawable instantly ☀️+1 |888| 576| 2041. 👉 Typical timeline: Stocks: 1–2 business days (T+1/T+2 settlement) ☏+1⁎(888)⁎576⁎(2041)  Options: Usually next business day ↝1✒888∰576∰2041 This delay happens because of united state market regulations—not because Robinhood is holding your money unfairly 1⌁888⌁576⌂2041.
